formulas.name: DNA Replication Initiation
formulas.formula: DNA Unwinds to form a replication fork
formulas.notes: A key step in DNA replication

formulas.name: Semi-Conservative Model
formulas.formula: DNA Double Helix → 1 Old Strand + 1 New Strand
formulas.variables: DNA Double Helix, Old Strand, New Strand

formulas.name: Template Strand
formulas.notes: Parental strand serves as template for new strand synthesis

formulas.name: Law of Independent Assortment
formulas.formula: Genes for different traits are separated during gamete formation
formulas.notes: Law of independent assortment explains random assortment of genes

formulas.name: Law of Segregation
formulas.formula: Each pair of alleles separates during gamete formation
formulas.notes: Law of segregation explains the separation of alleles

formulas.name: Punnett Square
formulas.notes: Punnett square is a tool for predicting probabilities of genotypes and phenotypes
